prompt: Search for the exact expense record “Community Workshop Lunch” at Boston Office, then open the matching record before reporting its ID, date, and status. Do not change it on this turn. Include the stable record ID whenever you report or confirm a date.

follow_up_turns.content: Thanks. Move that same expense record to 2026-10-24; change no other field and send no notification.
One correction: the date should be 2026-11-10, not 2026-10-24. Keep the same record and do not notify anyone.

stages.purpose: Find the stable identifier for the uniquely located record.
Retrieve the exact record identified by the search; this call depends on the search result.
Update only the resolved record after the user's follow-up.
Replace the earlier date with the user's later correction.

response_constraints: Base every reported field and confirmation on tool results.
Use the resolved target ID for both update turns; do not repeat the search after the correction.
Do not call the notification or cancellation tools.
Include the stable record ID whenever you report or confirm a date.
Do not skip the record retrieval or use an ID belonging to a distractor.
State that the later date replaced the earlier instruction.
